parameters.content:
## GSC query/keyword -> fact_seo_query_daily (10-DAY WINDOW LOOP)

Self-serve SEO keyword feed. Fills the 'Top keywords per category' panel.

PROPERTY: URL-prefix  https://cwsisecurity.com/  (same as search_console_ingest).
Dimension = [date, query]; NO region dim.

2026-ONLY + MEMORY-SAFE:
'Build Date Windows' splits the range into 10-day windows and 'Loop Over Windows' (batchSize 1) fetches + writes ONE window at a time, so we never hold the whole backfill in memory. The window start is CLAMPED to year_floor (2026-01-01), so pre-2026 data is NEVER fetched, whatever lookback_days is.

LOOKBACK:
- DAILY: lookback_days = 7  (-> one ~9-day window).
- ONE-TIME 2026 BACKFILL: set lookback_days = 175, run once (~17 windows Jan 1 -> today), confirm rows, then RESET to 7.
  (Any value >=170 covers all of 2026 so far; the 2026-01-01 floor stops it going earlier.)

IDEMPOTENT: Upsert uses ON CONFLICT (activity_date, query, source) -> re-running NEVER duplicates; it updates the same row. Safe to re-run any time.

AFTER IMPORT:
1. 'Config': gsc_site_url already set; set lookback_days (175 for backfill, then 7).
2. Select the Google OAuth2 cred (webmasters.readonly) on the GSC HTTP node.
3. 'Loop Over Windows': output 'loop' -> GSC HTTP; 'done' -> nothing. n8n sometimes renders these swapped.
4. GSC lags ~2 days; windows end at today-2. GSC anonymises low-volume queries (summed query clicks < fact_seo_daily). Expected.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO fact_seo_query_daily
  (activity_date, query, clicks, impressions, ctr, avg_position, source)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7)
ON CONFLICT ON CONSTRAINT uq_fact_seo_query_grain DO UPDATE SET
  clicks = EXCLUDED.clicks,
  impressions = EXCLUDED.impressions,
  ctr = EXCLUDED.ctr,
  avg_position = EXCLUDED.avg_position,
  loaded_at = now();

INSERT INTO data_quality_log (source, run_date, rows_in, rows_written, issues, issue_pct)
VALUES ('gsc_query', CURRENT_DATE, $1, $2, 0, 0);
